name: ReconciliationProjectionDecisionAndCoverage
description: Read-only candidate projections plus append-only decisions, current state, statement scopes, coverage, and exceptions.
schema_def: candidate_projection: opaque token, evidenceId and observation fingerprint, policyId and version, compatible candidates with exact bases and rejection reasons, conflicts, expiry; advisory only. reconciliation_decision: id, evidenceId, optional transactionId, disposition deterministic_match, statement_only, ambiguous, exception, owner_confirmed, rejected, revoked, or replaced; policyId and version; exact matchBasis; deterministic flag; required reason; actor; trusted time; optional previousDecisionId. current state derives as recorded_unreconciled, statement_reconciled, statement_only, recorded_absent_from_statement, ambiguous_match, owner_confirmed_match, or reconciliation_exception. statement_scope: id, accountId, period start/end, manifest opaque reference, status open or completed or replaced. coverage_entry and exception link scope to evidence, transaction, current outcome, reason, and active decision. No overwrite; ambiguous never auto-applies.
